catalog_description: Actor lifecycle and interaction events: BeginPlay, Tick, overlap, damage, hit, and destruction. Shows correct op:event target names and output pin signatures for plan JSON.
tags: event beginplay tick overlap damage hit destroyed endplay actor lifecycle

patterns.name: BeginPlay
patterns.description: Fires once when the actor starts playing (after all components are initialized). Most common event for setup logic.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:BeginPlay. No output data pins (exec only).

patterns.name: Tick
patterns.description: Fires every frame while the actor is ticking.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:Tick. Output pins: DeltaSeconds (Float). The actor must have ticking enabled.

patterns.name: EndPlay
patterns.description: Fires when the actor is being removed from the world or the game is ending.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:EndPlay. Output pins: EndPlayReason (EEndPlayReason).

patterns.name: ActorBeginOverlap
patterns.description: Fires when another actor begins overlapping this actor. Requires a collision component with Generate Overlap Events enabled.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:ActorBeginOverlap. Output pins: OtherActor (Actor).

patterns.name: ActorEndOverlap
patterns.description: Fires when another actor stops overlapping this actor.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:ActorEndOverlap. Output pins: OtherActor (Actor).

patterns.name: Hit
patterns.description: Fires when this actor is hit by another actor in a physics collision (blocking hit).
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:Hit. Output pins: MyComp (PrimitiveComponent), Other (Actor), OtherComp (PrimitiveComponent), NormalImpulse (Vector), HitResult (HitResult).

patterns.name: AnyDamage
patterns.description: Fires when the actor receives any type of damage via ApplyDamage.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:AnyDamage. Output pins: Damage (Float), DamageType (DamageType), InstigatedBy (Controller), DamageCauser (Actor).

patterns.name: PointDamage
patterns.description: Fires when the actor receives point damage (e.g., from a projectile via ApplyPointDamage).
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:PointDamage. Output pins: Damage (Float), DamageType (DamageType), HitLocation (Vector), HitNormal (Vector), HitComponent (PrimitiveComponent), BoneName (Name), ShotFromDirection (Vector), InstigatedBy (Controller), DamageCauser (Actor), HitInfo (HitResult).

patterns.name: RadialDamage
patterns.description: Fires when the actor receives radial (area-of-effect) damage.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:RadialDamage. Output pins: DamageReceived (Float), DamageType (DamageType), Origin (Vector), HitInfo (HitResult), InstigatedBy (Controller), DamageCauser (Actor).

patterns.name: Destroyed
patterns.description: Fires when DestroyActor is called on this actor, just before actual destruction.
patterns.notes: Use op:event, target:Destroyed. No output data pins (exec only).
